title: glycine simplicifolia
intro: Glycine simplicifolia, also known as Chinese milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glycine simplicifolia include improving kidney function, reducing blood sugar levels, and enhancing immune system function. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
